message.content: Getting a runtime error: undefined is not a function in auth.ts at line 42.

content.text: The undefined is not a function error in auth.ts usually means a method is called on a null object. Check that the user object is initialized before calling its methods. Add a null check before line 42. The error is resolved by guarding the call.

message.content: Also seeing an error with the JWT token validation failing.

content.text: JWT validation error is often a clock skew issue. The solution: add a leeway of 30 seconds to your token verification: jwt.verify(token, secret, { clockTolerance: 30 }). This fixed the intermittent validation failures. Working now.
